features: Duracell Plus batteries are versatile alkaline batteries and are suitable for everyday electronics.
Safety: Premium nylon cover prevents battery leakage.
Duracell The technology keeps the energy of your unused batteries in the package for up to 10 years (storage at room temperature).
98% of our paper-based packaging is made from recycled materials.
AA and AAA Made in Belgium - Available in sizes AA, AAA, C, D, 4.5V and 9V
* AAA batteries compared to the average minimum life in the IEC test with motorized toys from 2015. Results may vary depending on device or usage behavior (IEC website).
